appliedUpdates.description: Fixed architecture.md references from 'anthropic.ts' to 'claude.ts' in 3 locations (file tree, AI flow diagram, module table) to match actual codebase filename

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'In client components under [locale]/, always import useRouter from @/i18n/navigation (not next/navigation) to ensure locale-aware navigation. Similarly, import Link from @/i18n/navigation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/app/[locale]/quest/[id]/page.tsx imports useRouter from 'next/navigation' instead of '@/i18n/navigation', causing the abandon quest handler to navigate without locale prefix. All other pages (login, discover, quest/new) correctly use '@/i18n/navigation'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that sanitizeInput() should also be called on URL inputs received from the client, not just free-text strings. The current wording 'Sanitize ALL user-generated text UNCONDITIONALLY' is ambiguous about whether URLs count as 'text'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/app/api/quest/[id]/mission/[missionId]/route.ts and src/app/api/quest/[id]/complete/route.ts accept proofPhotoUrl/selectedPhotoUrl from the client and store them in the database without calling sanitizeInput(). In contrast, src/app/api/quest/generate/route.ts correctly sanitizes dream and localContext text inputs. This inconsistency was flagged across two independent feature reviews (quest-daily-progress and quest-completion-flow).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'User-submitted storage URLs (e.g., proofPhotoUrl, imageUrl) must be validated against an allowlist of expected storage domains (e.g., the app's own R2 bucket URL or local mock storage URL). Do not accept arbitrary URLs from clients for storage references.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/app/api/quest/[id]/mission/[missionId]/route.ts accepts any valid URL as proofPhotoUrl without verifying it originates from the app's own storage. Since this is a children's platform, defense-in-depth dictates validating URL origin.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'All user-facing text in JSX must use next-intl translation keys via t(). Never hardcode English strings in components under [locale]/. This includes labels in image overlays, badges, and dynamic text interpolation.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: src/app/[locale]/quest/[id]/complete/page.tsx line 450 has hardcoded 'Day {mission.day}' instead of using a translation key. All other strings on the same page correctly use t().

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback suggests adding afterEach(cleanup) by default to test templates when using vi.mock for next-intl with jsdom.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a test utility pattern, not a shared state concern. All existing test files already include afterEach(cleanup) consistently. Adding this to AGENTS.md would be too granular; it's better addressed in the fullstack-worker skill's test templates if at all.

rejectedObservations.observation: Quest pages live outside the documented (auth) route group at src/app/[locale]/quest/ instead of src/app/[locale]/(auth)/quest/.
rejectedObservations.reason: The architecture doc describes (auth) as a route group convention, but the middleware-based auth protection works regardless of route groups. Other routes (discover, login) are also outside (auth) in practice. The (auth) group was likely a planned convention that wasn't strictly followed. Updating the architecture doc would be premature — this is a broader convention question for the orchestrator to decide.
